courseleaf.title: Materials Science & Engineering, Master of Engineering
courseleaf.informationtext:
The Master of Engineering Degree in Materials Science & Engineering

The one-year Master of Engineering (M.Eng.) degree is the most flexible degree we offer. With two different tracks to choose from, students can mold the degree to fit their interests and goals, whether they include training in additional engineering, computer science or management courses.

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Materials Science & Engineering.
courseleaf.quickviewtext: The Materials Science and Engineering Graduate Program provides students with a strong background in advanced materials synthesis, processing and characterization — both from an experimental and theoretical standpoint.  The Master of Engineering degree allows flexibility in your elective courses, and can be molded to fit your interests and goals, whether they include training in additional engineering, computer science or management courses.
